prose.en: Implement the following additional monitoring of privileged users: {param:si-04.20_odp}.

guidance.en: Privileged users have access to more sensitive information, including security-related information, than the general user population. Access to such information means that privileged users can potentially do greater damage to systems and organizations than non-privileged users. Therefore, implementing additional monitoring on privileged users helps to ensure that organizations can identify malicious activity at the earliest possible time and take appropriate actions.

objects.en: procedures addressing system monitoring tools and techniques
system monitoring tools and techniques documentation
system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel installing, configuring, and/or maintaining the system
organizational personnel responsible for monitoring the system
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing a system monitoring capability

guidelines.en: additional monitoring of privileged users is defined;
